name: 2pk Vintage Windsor Dining Chairs - Aged Oak - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Amp up the look of your entertainment space with these Vintage Windsor Dining Chairs from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made with a lacquered stained-finish rubberwood frame, this armless dining chair set features a spacious seat and curved backrest, along with pedestal flared legs to tie the dining look together with classic charm. Pair this dining chair set with a matching table to create a cohesive look for casual entertaining.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall width: 18 inches
Overall depth: 22.5 inches
Overall height: 36 inches
Seat height: 18 inches
